name: handoffkit
description: HandoffKit by DynG AI brings the PlatformPilot.ai coordination model to Codex: explicit agent handoffs, actor-style mailboxes, routed ownership transfer, pub/sub awareness, fan-in joins, budgets, dead letters, and traceable multi-agent workflows.

interface.longDescription: Built by DynG AI, HandoffKit brings the PlatformPilot.ai coordination model into Codex. Use it to design agent systems that move work through explicit, traceable handoffs instead of shared scratchpads: actor-style mailboxes, select-style waits, routed ownership transfer, broadcast awareness, fan-in joins and quorums, cancellation, budgets, dead letters, and message-level traces. It is the practical foundation for multi-agent workflows that are easier to inspect, easier to bound, and safer to scale.
defaultPrompt: Use handoffkit to design a PlatformPilot-style multi-agent system.
Use handoffkit to scaffold the Go runtime primitives into this repo.
